_publications._publicationTitle: Molecular conformation of the full-length tumor suppressor NF2/Merlin--a small-angle neutron scattering study.

_contextSnippet: Molecular mass measurements by static light scattering indicates that Merlin(wt) and Merlin(S518D) are monomers in solution
details: Successfully measured molecular mass of Merlin(wt) and Merlin(S518D), confirming both are monomers in solution
